creator: michiel@vanbaak.eu
text:
Created attachment 251151
0001-multimedia-jellyfin-Update-to-10.9.4.patch

for the updates to jellyfin-web: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin-web/releases/tag/v10.9.4
Because of the security issue we did not want to wait for the update to source-build the port, thus thefrank was kind enough to build and release the binaries again.
Work on the source build version is still ongoing.


poudriere ok
quick index and play test on my setup (14 amd64)
